entities.letters: magnetic letters spelling a word with a gap

scenes.title: The Whiteboard
scenes.background_prompt: A kindergarten classroom with a large magnetic whiteboard, small chairs and tables, colorful artwork on the walls, and bins of supplies. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A kindergarten classroom with bright artwork covering the walls. A boy of about five in a dinosaur t-shirt stands on tiptoes in front of a large magnetic whiteboard mounted on the wall. On the whiteboard, colorful magnetic letters spell 'C _ T' with a clear gap in the middle. The boy holds a red magnetic letter 'A' in his right hand, reaching up toward the gap, about to complete the word. His tongue pokes out slightly in concentration. Other magnetic letters in various colors are scattered across the bottom of the whiteboard. Small wooden chairs and round tables are arranged behind him. Bins of crayons, markers, and building blocks line the shelves below the windows.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place boy standing on tiptoes in front of the magnetic whiteboard, holding a red letter 'A' in right hand, reaching up toward the gap in 'C_T'. Tongue poking out in concentration.
scenes.scene_description: In a brightly lit classroom with light brown wooden floors, a wooden shelving unit stands against the far left wall, holding a green bin on its top shelf and a blue bin on its bottom shelf, both filled with colorful toy blocks. Above this shelf, four children's drawings are pinned to the wall, including a yellow handprint, a green landscape, and two yellow suns. To the right of the shelf, a blue plastic chair sits on the floor. In the foreground, a boy with curly brown hair, wearing a yellow long-sleeved shirt, green pants, and blue and white sneakers, stands on top of a round red table. He reaches his right hand toward a large white whiteboard mounted on the wall to touch a red 'A', which is part of three magnetic letters spelling "CAT"; the 'C' and 'T' are blue. The boy has a focused expression with his tongue slightly poking out. Surrounding the red table are two green chairs and one yellow chair. To the right of the red table, a long rectangular wooden table is surrounded by five small chairs in red, green, and yellow. Behind the boy, a long wooden shelving unit runs along the wall, topped with bins of pencils, crayons, and blocks. The shelves are filled with a blue bin of blocks, green and yellow building blocks, an orange basket of toys, a row of colorful books in red, blue, green, and purple, an orange basket of balls, and various other bins. The wall behind the shelves is decorated with framed drawings of a rainbow, a sun, and colorful scribbles. A large arched window in the center of the back wall reveals a sunny outdoor scene with rolling green hills, leafy green trees, and a light blue sky with fluffy white clouds. The room is filled with soft, warm light, indicating a clear daytime.
